description: Create four Kubernetes CronJobs in the 'operations' namespace according to the specification document located on the desktop at /home/ga/Desktop/cronjob_pipeline_spec.md. Each CronJob must precisely match the schedule, image, resource configurations, and prerequisite references outlined in the spec. The required Secret and ConfigMap already exist in the operations namespace. You may use the Rancher UI (https://localhost, credentials: admin / Admin12345678!) or the terminal via kubectl.
